note: Based on US FDA & UK NHS food safety guidelines. Not medical advice. When in doubt, throw it out.

fridge.tip: Store in airtight container. Reheat to 74°C (165°F).

freezer.tip: Wrap tightly. Thaw in fridge, not countertop.

fridge.tip: Cool quickly and refrigerate within 2 hours of cooking.

freezer.tip: Scrambled eggs freeze better than fried.

fridge.tip: Keep sealed. Check smell and appearance before use.

freezer.tip: Some sauces freeze well; check consistency.

fridge.tip: Store on the bottom shelf. Do not wash raw chicken.

freezer.tip: Best within 3-9 months. Label with date.

fridge.tip: Cool quickly, store in shallow containers.

freezer.tip: Freeze in portion sizes for convenience.
Freeze well. Good up to 3 months.

fridge.tip: Keep in airtight container with a paper towel to absorb moisture.

freezer.tip: Most salad greens don't freeze well.

fridge.tip: Reheat in oven or pan for best texture.
